description:
Castagna 2024 algorithm for set-theoretic polymorphism. Type variables, generalization, instantiation.

Probably wants tallying / type connectives over variables. Big work item — defer until monomorphic typer is solid.

comments.text: Shipped in commit 8812d84 — per-call-shape specialization with mangled symbols. Test: jit::tests::jit_specializes_polymorphic_fn_per_call_shape.

title: Parametric polymorphism
